# o2-scalpel-ruby

Scalpel refactor MCP server for Ruby via ruby-lsp

## Install

```bash
claude plugin install o2-scalpel-ruby --from o2-scalpel
```

## Requirements

- Claude Code >= 1.0.0
- LSP server: `ruby-lsp` on `$PATH`
- File extensions handled: .rb, .erb

## Facades

| Facade | Summary |
|---|---|
| `scalpel_rename` | Rename a symbol across the workspace |
| `scalpel_extract` | Extract selection into a method or variable |
| `scalpel_fix_lints` | Apply rubocop + standard diagnostic quick-fixes |

## Skills

This plugin ships skills under `skills/` so Claude knows when to call each facade.
